name: TangentCalculus
summary: Tangent calculation at an element point

methods.name: Calculate
methods.signature: Calculate(line: Line2D) -> Vector3D | Calculate(line: Line3D) -> Vector3D | Calculate(polyline: Polyline2D, inputPnt: Point3D) -> Vector3D | Calculate(polyline: Polyline3D, inputPnt: Point3D) -> Vector3D | Calculate(polygon: Polygon2D, inputPnt: Point3D) -> Vector3D | Calculate(arc: Arc2D, inputPnt: Point3D) -> Vector3D | Calculate(arc: Arc3D, inputPnt: Point3D) -> Vector3D | Calculate(spline: Spline2D, inputPnt: Point3D) -> Vector3D | Calculate(spline: Spline3D, inputPnt: Point3D) -> Vector3D | Calculate(bspline: BSpline2D, inputPnt: Point3D) -> Vector3D | Calculate(bspline: BSpline3D, inputPnt: Point3D) -> Vector3D | Calculate(clothoid: Clothoid2D, inputPnt: Point3D) -> Vector3D | Calculate(path: Path2D, inputPnt: Point3D) -> Vector3D | Calculate(brep: BRep3D, inputPnt: Point3D) -> Vector3DList | Calculate(geoObject: object, inputPnt: Point3D) -> Vector3D

params.name: line
params.doc: Line2D on which to calculate tangent vector

methods.name: CalculateNormal
methods.summary: Calculates normal vector of BRep3D at given point
methods.remarks: Calculates normal vector of BRep3D at given point

params.name: inputPnt
params.doc: point on object for normal calculation
